1110: Age and real name unknown.
”Stephen” is said to be an assumed 
name. 

Sometimes cooperates with those who
pursue the middle path, though he is
a neutral party himself. It is evident
that Stephen is not a normal human,
since he is able to travel in the Expanse,
the Diamond Realm, and even dreams.
Current speculation is that Stephen is
a being froma higher dimension. This is
supported by his ability to influence
parallel universes.
 
[END]
1111: Age and real name unknown.
”Stephen” is said to be an assumed 
name. 

Sometimes cooperates with those who
pursue the middle path, though he is
a neutral party himself. It is evident
that Stephen is not a normal human,
since he is able to travel in the Expanse,
the Diamond Realm, and even dreams.
Current speculation is that Stephen is
a being from a higher dimension. This is
supported by his ability to influence
parallel universes.
[END]
